message:
fix(agentmail): prevent thundering herd and improve Unicode handling

Address concurrency issues and improve robustness of Agent Mail
client operations.

Thundering herd prevention (client.go):
- Add healthCheckMu sync.Mutex to serialize IsAvailable() health checks
- Implement double-checked locking: optimistic lock-free cache check,
  then acquire mutex and re-check before performing actual health check
- Prevents multiple goroutines from simultaneously hitting the server
  when the availability cache expires

Unicode slug sanitization (client.go):
- Rewrite ProjectSlugFromPath() using unicode.ToLower() and rune
  iteration instead of byte-level ASCII manipulation
- Properly handles Unicode project names and special characters
- Uses strings.Builder for efficient string construction

Session handling improvements (session.go):
- Extract getSessionsBaseDir() helper for consistent path resolution
- Add fallback chain: UserConfigDir() -> UserHomeDir() -> HOME env ->
  TempDir() for maximum compatibility across environments
- Fix RegisterSessionAgent() to check AgentName != "" before reusing
  existing registration (prevents reusing incomplete registrations)
- Let server auto-generate agent names instead of using sanitized
  session names, improving uniqueness and avoiding conflicts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
